description: User spends time reading the research task instructions on the overlay regarding home loan search behavior.
frame_description: A dark overlay with white text displays task instructions over a Google search page.

description: User clicks the 'Start task' button to dismiss the instructions and begin the research session.
User pauses briefly to look at the 'Trending searches' list before starting to type.
User types 'home' into the Google search input field, triggering search suggestions.
frame_description: The search bar now contains the word 'home' and a list of suggestions like 'home loan calculator' is visible.
